hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#exit 0 cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors ### These two works OK but it computes the canonical form for the entire file, not one by one. #php resource_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS2EoL_zip", "task": "add_canonical_in_taxa"}' #php resource_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc_2025_05_17", "task": "add_canonical_in_taxa"}'
### These 3 use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. #php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora"}' #OK #php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc"}' #May 27 2025 #OK #php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS2EoL"}' #php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "TreatmentBank_final"}' #php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "wikipedia_en_traits"}'
### a utility for testing: #php DHconn.php _
# OK 5 Start matching taxa ###php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS-with-hC"}' #gen neo4j_2 ###php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "Brazilian_Flora-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_2 ###php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "wikipedia_en_traits-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_2 ###php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "TreatmentBank_final-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_2
# orig #php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "TreatmentBank_final-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "old"}' #OK gen +_eolID #php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "TreatmentBank_final-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
# Katja's test #php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "TreatmentBank_final-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "old"}' #OK gen +_eolID #php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "TreatmentBank_final-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
#php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "old"}' #OK gen +_eolID #php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
php analyze_MoF.php _ '{"resource_id": "WoRMS_finale"}'
# rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp WoRMS_finale.tar.gz WoRMS_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt WoRMS_finale.tar.gz ls -lt WoRMS_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f WoRMS_finale.tar.gz
